fit: Good fit for SQL validation, Python automation, data quality, ETL testing, AWS data services, PySpark/Spark, production troubleshooting, observability, and incident response. Main gaps are direct Databricks and Kafka production ownership.
core_pitch: I bring senior data engineering and production data quality experience with SQL, Python, validation, reconciliation, AWS S3/Glue/Redshift/Athena patterns, PySpark/Spark, and root-cause troubleshooting. I have built automated checks and validation workflows for production datasets and high-volume migrations.
honest_ramp_areas: Formal CI/CD data test framework ownership
interview_focus: Data quality dimensions: completeness, accuracy, consistency, timeliness, uniqueness
Python automated testing with pytest-style utilities
Kafka basics: topics, partitions, offsets, consumer groups
Pipeline observability: metrics, logs, alerts, SLAs/SLOs
